name: chain_technical_founder_seeking_growth_partner
method: Technical founder seeking growth partner for near complete trading platform

stages.task: Scan r/growthhacking + r/startups + r/entrepreneur daily for posts: 'seeking growth', 'need marketing co-founder', 'have product need distribution', 'near complete looking for partner'
Score leads: product exists (not idea-stage)? Technical domain (automatable)? Poster active in last 30 days? Filter out regulated (crypto/securities trading) — flag but do not pursue those

Route qualified leads to eas_lead_pipeline.py for cold outreach. Subject: 'saw your post — have a growth system that runs itself'. Regulated leads (trading/fintech) routed to engagement_bait_converter.py only
